creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

unfortunately, there hasn't been any update on this PR [1] for a while. A
tinderbox test of devel/libcoyotl just finished successfully.  What's the
status of this with you? Are you still able to reproduce this problem, or
can this PR be closed?

Regards,
Stefan

[1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/143501
